_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第003集·爆点版(new_story/arc-01 · 003《我的生死判决，用我听不懂的话当面宣读》)。💣本集爆点=医生当面一句句宣判她的生死,而那串话她十句跟不上九句(快语速+医家话=人设里她跟不上的),只能装死等判决——她还亮出E02学的'听不懂'硬扛,并从一串话里抠出自己的新名字'沈青梧'。★黄金3秒(script-rules 0):首帧=医生搭脉宣判进行时,前3拍自证(假新娘+验身死局),禁裸承接。触发器:与我有关(越南假新娘)+生死利害(宣判生死)+好奇缺口(诊断结果是什么)≥3。人设口径(2026-07-16修正):半吊子中文——十句听不懂九句(不是'一个字都听不懂',禁句见 script-rules 1-2),能抠出高频词和自己的名字。本集中文:沈青梧(认新名字)+复用E02'听不懂'。连戏:女主整集红嫁衣长袖高领款躺床装虚弱;医生无定妆图=全程不露正脸(背影/只出手,深灰西装黑皮药箱,灰白短发);顾晏辞深炭色西装。图复用:s1-pulse/s3-tell/s4-peek/s5-demand 复用 07/15 linglan-ep03 已验收图($0),新出 s2-whisper。尾钩=诊断结果到底是什么(下集揭:失忆)。

shots.content: Close-up: the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride lies weakly on the pillow with eyes almost closed, face pale and tense, in the SAME red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, long black hair spread out; from the side, ONLY the doctor's aged hands are visible — one hand holding her slender wrist taking her pulse, a stethoscope and black leather medical bag resting on the red silk quilt beside her; NO doctor face, her face is the only face in frame, dim warm morning light. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.zh: 医生正在宣判我的生死
captions.local: Bác sĩ đang tuyên án sinh tử của tôi
mà mười câu tôi chẳng hiểu nổi chín
Tôi là cô dâu giả đến từ Việt Nam
Giả yếu ớt, đừng mở miệng

captions.pinyin: fū rén nǎ lǐ bù shū fu
captions.local: Phu nhân, khó chịu ở đâu

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride lying weakly on the pillow wearing the SAME LONG-SLEEVED ornate red traditional Chinese wedding dress with gold embroidery and modest high neckline (fully clothed, NO bare shoulders, NO sleeveless nightgown, NO spaghetti straps), long black hair spread on the pillow, eyes barely half-open and glassy, face pale and tense, lips just parted whispering something faint and broken, one trembling hand resting weakly on the red silk quilt over her chest, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure, dim warm morning light in the opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, her single face in frame. Cinematic close-up with shallow depth of field. Landscape.

captions.local: Ông ấy đang chờ tôi trả lời
Tīng… bù dǒng
Câu tiếng Trung cứu mạng, xuất chiêu

shots.content: The tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in an impeccable dark charcoal suit stands listening with a grave unreadable expression, arms at his sides, in a dim opulent mansion bedroom; in the blurred foreground the middle-aged doctor is seen only as a three-quarter BACK view — his hair is clearly SHORT GREY-WHITE (salt-and-pepper, mostly grey, NOT black), dark grey suit shoulder — speaking to him, the doctor's face NOT visible; the young man is the only face in frame. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.zh: 医生转身，对我丈夫开口
captions.local: Bác sĩ quay sang nói với chồng tôi

captions.zh: 夫人脉象虚浮，心神受损
captions.pinyin: fū rén mài xiàng xū fú xīn shén shòu sǔn
captions.local: Mạch phu nhân hư phù, tâm thần tổn thương

captions.pinyin: shěn qīng wú fū rén shòu jīng guò dù
captions.local: Phu nhân Thẩm Thanh Ngô bị kinh sợ quá độ
Thẩm Thanh Ngô
Tôi chỉ nghe hiểu được cái tên này
Đó là… tên của tôi bây giờ

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride lying on the pillow wearing the SAME LONG-SLEEVED red traditional Chinese wedding dress with gold embroidery and high modest neckline (fully clothed, NO bare shoulders, NO sleeveless nightgown, NO spaghetti straps), secretly peeking sideways with eyes barely half-open toward something at the far side of the room NOT at the camera, tense anxious expression with held breath, fingers gripping the edge of the red silk quilt pulled up near her chin, long black hair on the pillow, dim warm light, single face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Họ nói vừa nhanh vừa khẽ
Chữ nào là án tử của tôi
Nhớ lấy, tôi tên Thẩm Thanh Ngô

shots.content: Close-up of the tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in a dark charcoal suit, icy impatient piercing gaze, jaw set, dim opulent mansion bedroom with warm lattice-window morning light behind him, he is the only person in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Nói kết quả đi
Bác sĩ nhìn cô một cái
rồi hạ giọng xuống
Kết quả chẩn đoán rốt cuộc là gì
Theo dõi tập sau nhé
